title: Bike Touring Vlog - Semijarvi, Finland to Amsterdam, Netherlands 8 & 9-2010 2/5

transcript.text: Across the fjords I'd see huge packs of them I mean they were everywhere hundreds and hundreds
And hundreds everywhere but my friend said that they were uh domesticated ones those ones
Um so but it was beautiful because you know the fog and then the thing goes with the truck goes
Way up over the hill and then way down along the beach with all the houses and then instead of
Going along the thing it does a shortcut way over the mountain and then you see you know all of
These glaciers there and we had to take the boat to put the bus on some boat to go across the fjord
To the other side you know and you see glaciers everywhere and huge mountains and so everything's
Green and you know how beautiful houses it was just beautiful would have been amazing probably
The most amazing place to bike tour but whatever I had to meet my brother and to be honest I wasn't
Planning on riding there anyway originally I was but then I wasn't just to save time
So but anyways yeah if you want to bike to the most amazing place you got to do up there if you can
Afford it so yeah but it took me for like four days just to get there because I had to take that bus and
Then I had to stay in some other town called uh yeah yeah yeah I can't remember but it had a really
Cool ski resort it had two ski resorts right on the town and the town was like right on the ocean
And then some of the one of the ski resorts would look pretty good and um for some reason I got
Confused and I thought that the exchange rate was like 6.7 kroners to the dollar when it was really
16.7 freaking kroners to the dollar so shit was a lot more expensive excuse my french stuff was a lot
More expensive than I thought and um yeah because I went into some bar well I saw a movie which is 15
They went to a bar and I got a beer which was 15 for one beer in a restaurant in a uh in this freaking
Hotel bar place where I was doing the internet before oh no I wasn't doing the internet yes I was
Doing the internet um yeah that's how much they go but I didn't know that at the time I found out later
And then I was like all right so my next bus had to leave at seven in the morning so I went over to
The bus station and the parking lot and I just kind of sat there and I put the my sleeping bag over
Me um and so I was really cold but I was I wasn't like suffering that bad and then at like four in
The morning or something I see these like three like 17 year old kids like raising hell dude like
Running yeah trying to open up car doors and the shit you know and then they notice me and they're
Like what and they come over to me and they're like ended up hanging out with me all the way until
From four in the morning until like seven when my bus left like three hours or something and they're
Fascinated by me they were like asking me all these questions and they were telling me stuff about
You know I guess there were these kids who went went there from the like next door next town and
They didn't have any money and they brought their own alcohol with them and they let me drink some of
It and it was like gas it was the most it was the strongest shit I ever had in my life man even
Stronger than the vodka that the russians gave me and um in ukraine um and um they had been drinking
That I guess I didn't want any more um and they're like yeah norway is expensive but fuck this place
It's fucking cold and they they knew how much how many uh kronos it was to the dollar and everybody in

And that closed at like two and there was this one norwegian guy who's buying me beers and they

One so yeah norwegians were really generous uh or they have a lot of money um but it's that was cool
And then I um um yeah and then those kids like they left um one of them was a sammy the sammy
Actually guy was the one who's the most talked about but they were they were cool they ran out and

Bars and orange juices and bread and all this stuff and it was really cool because before that they

Hung out in that town all day and then I got to take the train that was where I got south enough to

Was like 140 bucks I ended up spending 400 bucks just to get the transportation from wherever from
Uh kartikane to from caryshock to tronheim um but I saw some amazing territory and I didn't

So he went and the other guy let him stay there too so and um so yeah my brother had been bike
